# Homework 1

This is a book created from markdown and executable code.

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.

Favorite Graph
```{r}
x <- seq(-3,3,by=0.01)
y <- exp(x) + log(abs(x))
plot(x,y)
```

```{r}
pak::pak("thomasgstewart/ds6021b")

require(ds6021b)

W <- data.frame(x1 = 1.3, x2 = -0.5, x3 = 1)
f1(W)
```
